content: Cloudarm MCPs remotos: memory(8001), playwright(8002 nativo), fetch(8003), context7(8004), context(8005), brave-search(8006)
Cloudarm serviços: Ollama CPU-only, Qdrant, Chromium headless, supergateway. Sem Open WebUI, sem Pelican.
Cloudarm net.ifnames=0 removido. Manter nomes predictable (enp0s6). networking.useDHCP=true funciona com qualquer nome

Phase 2 Plan 04 complete: addMessage dedup guard fixes UAT test 7. Dedup by messageStamp+assetName composite key with optimistic set() before await saveMessage() to prevent TOCTOU race. Both FCM onMessage and SW postMessage paths deliver the same push with different ids. 6 tests including concurrent-call race test. Commits: 5ff5aa5 (test), c1d3e56 (feat).
Cloudarm boot: GRUB EFI (não systemd-boot). efiInstallAsRemovable=true, device=nodev. ESP 98MB em /boot/efi (sda15)
Cloudarm propósito: server de memória para agentes (local-rag). Não é chat/Open WebUI. 100% code RAG workload.

valida.doctor — regras de camada NestJS (layer rules tabela):

| Camada           | Importa / recebe              | NUNCA importa                        |
|------------------|-------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| *.controller.ts  | *.service.ts, shared/schemas (só para tipos de request/response e ZodValidationPipe), common/guards, common/decorators | db/schema.ts, db/db.ts, *.repository.ts |
| *.service.ts     | *.repository.ts, domain/, lib/ | shared/schemas/, db/schema.ts, db/db.ts |
| *.repository.ts  | DB_TOKEN via @Inject, db/schema.ts | shared/schemas/, *.service.ts       |
| domain/          | nada interno                  | tudo (TypeScript puro)               |
| dto/             | nada interno                  | tudo (TypeScript puro)               |

Repository NUNCA expõe tipos Drizzle para fora — mapeia InferSelect para entity/DTO antes de retornar.
Service NUNCA conhece Drizzle, NUNCA conhece Zod, NUNCA conhece shared/schemas.
Controller é o ÚNICO ponto onde shared/schemas é usado — e apenas para validação de entrada e formatação de saída.
Phase04 key decisions: AssetSnapshotItem maps snake_case→camelCase at store level. SummaryCards computed from assets array (not Firestore). snapshotAt replaces per-unit updatedAt.

Phase 2 (notification-gating) fully complete: 4 plans executed, all requirements (SW-01, SW-02, SW-03, SETT-01) satisfied, verification passed. Plan 04 fixed the duplicate feed items bug with optimistic dedup guard in addMessage. Next phase: 3 (asset-snapshot-backend).

Suites (suites.dev) foi discutido 4+ vezes. Decisão ainda não tomada pelo usuário — ele continua perguntando porque o Claude muda de posição a cada sessão sem memória do contexto anterior. O problema real que Suites resolveria: testes colapsam todas as camadas (controller+service+repository) usando db e pglite diretamente, resultando em 99 usos de db/pglite espalhados nos test files. Com Suites: TestBed.solitary(Service) mocka Repository automaticamente com tipos corretos — sem db, sem pglite, sem bypass de banco. createTestApp ficaria só para contrato HTTP (status code, shape). O usuário está exigindo uma posição consistente e fundamentada, não vai-e-volta a cada sessão.
Cloudarm firewall: desabilitado no NixOS (networking.firewall.enable=false). Filtragem via Oracle Security List. Portas: 22/TCP + 51820/UDP

Decisão explícita do usuário: IndexedDB é a ÚNICA persistência para preferências de notificação. LocalStorage NÃO deve ser usado — nem como fallback — sem decisão explícita do usuário. Isso vale para todo o projeto.
Cloudarm config path: /home/bruno/dotfiles/hosts/cloudarm/. Flake: nixosConfigurations.cloudarm, system=aarch64-linux.
Cloudarm Pterodactyl descartado: nginx+php+mariadb+redis+wings+docker container game server. Tudo será apagado pelo infect
Cloudarm Qdrant: ~300MB RAM para 6 projetos com dim=1024. Embed dim muda de 768 para 1024 (qwen3-embedding).

Phase 3 (asset-snapshot-backend) context gathered. Key decisions: getAssetSnapshot CF returns { assets: AssetSnapshot[], snapshotAt: string, count: number }. Excludes last_message_id and silent_alert_sent_at. Flat array ordered by asset_name. 'todas' = SELECT * without filter. requireActiveUser auth (any active user). No units = empty array (not error). Turso down = HttpsError. No cache/rate limit. Frontend has separate AssetSnapshot type. Backend is agnostic API.

Phase 3 (asset-snapshot-backend) complete: getAssetSnapshot CF implemented via TDD. 1 plan, 2 tasks, 5 commits. AssetSnapshotItem type excludes internal fields. getAssetsByUnits() with parameterized WHERE IN. CF uses requireActiveUser, 'todas' → getAllAssets(), empty units → empty array, Turso error → HttpsError('unavailable'). 136/136 tests pass. Requirements SNAP-01, SNAP-02 satisfied. Next: Phase 4 (home-redesign).
Phase04 key decisions: Notifications stay in Layout slide-up panel (only unread). Home page shows ONLY assets after redesign. Historical msgs remain in IndexedDB. No new npm deps.

Phase 4 (home-redesign) context: Assets as primary home content, notifications in existing slide-up panel. SummaryCards stays, data unified from snapshot (no separate Firestore call). Asset rows: minimal (name+dot+status+time), tap expands. Filter: pill buttons Todos/Fora/Dentro with count badges, default Todos with Out-first sort. Text search kept. FCM updates: flash highlight ~2s, re-sort, filtered items fade out after ~3s delay. Skeleton loading while snapshot loads.
Cloudarm MCP proxy: supergateway (npm) wrapa stdio→SSE. Cliente usa supergateway --sse para conectar. Tudo via WireGuard.

Phase 2 UAT: Duplicate messages bug found. Root cause: FirebaseMessagingService.initialize() has dual delivery — onMessage (foreground FCM) and SW postMessage (FCM_MESSAGE broadcast) both trigger listener callbacks, causing addMessage to be called twice per push. Store has no dedup. Fix: either deduplicate in addMessage by messageStamp+assetName, or prevent SW from broadcasting FCM_MESSAGE when app is in foreground.
Dotfiles era só pra PCs. Cloudarm é primeiro servidor. common/global tem coisas desktop-only: font.nix, cuda.nix, xkb, hw firmware
Cloudarm embedding: qwen3-embedding:8b (4.7GB). Descrições: qwen2.5-coder:14b (9GB). Total ~14GB, sobram 10GB.

Collision behavior implementation: dismissPrior = use same tag + renotify:true (browser replaces natively), showNew = append timestamp to tag (unique = new notification), silent = skip showNotification entirely. getNotifications({tag}) used for silent collision check but fail-open on iOS. Messages always broadcast to clients and stored in IDB feed regardless of gating decision.
Cloudarm users: bruno (normal+wheel), ubuntu (normal+wheel, compatibilidade Oracle), root (SSH key). Todos com mesma RSA key

Bug: `nh os switch` (nh 4.3.0) does not restart the home-manager-bruno.service after building a new HM generation. `sudo nixos-rebuild switch` works correctly — it shows "restarting the following units: home-manager-bruno.service" and applies HM changes. This is an nh-specific bug. Workaround: use `sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake ~/dotfiles#predabook` or run `nh home switch` separately after `nh os switch`.
MCPs locais (stdio): memory/local-rag (aponta Ollama/Qdrant remotos), filesystem, git, sequential-thinking

Anti-padrões de teste introduzidos pelo Claude e nunca corrigidos: (1) `pglite` exposto no TestApp — usado para DDL inline, DELETE, INSERT e SELECT bruto via SQL string. (2) `db: any` exposto no TestApp — Drizzle sem tipo. (3) DDL inline em cada test file — removido em 2026-03-13 mas pglite e db ainda expostos. (4) 99 usos de pglite.exec/query e db.insert/select espalhados pelos test files. Solução correta: TestApp expõe só `app` + `db` tipado com ReturnType<typeof createDb>. Reset via db.delete() tipado. Seed via db.insert() tipado. pglite nunca exposto fora do createTestApp. Suites foi discutido 3x mas descartado — o problema real é a falta de disciplina no setup, não a ausência de Suites.

Security hardening added to NestJS API (2026-03-13):
- helmet({ contentSecurityPolicy: false, crossOriginEmbedderPolicy: false }) in main.ts — same config as original Express
- @nestjs/throttler (NOT express-rate-limit) — NestJS official recommendation
- ThrottlerModule.forRoot global: 300 req/min per IP in AppModule
- ThrottlerGuard registered as APP_GUARD globally
- QuestionsController has @Throttle({ default: { ttl: 60_000, limit: 60 } }) — extra protection against bank extraction
- GET /config has @SkipThrottle() — legitimate public route
- 404 handler registered after nestApp.init() returning { error: { code: 'NOT_FOUND', message: ... } }
Cloudarm iptables Oracle: regras InstanceServices (169.254.x.x) p/ metadata/iSCSI. Com firewall.enable=false, tudo ACCEPT — sem conflito

Phase 2 research complete: SW gating uses pure functions in notificationGating.ts (resolveNotificationAction, resolveCollisionAction). SW can import from project modules because vite-plugin-pwa injectManifest bundles with Vite. Tag strategy: asset-{name} for collision (per CONTEXT.md override — NOT compound {assetId}:{eventType}). NEW_USER_PENDING uses unique tags, no collision. Vitest setup needed in app/ directory (first time). Radix Accordion + Switch new dependencies. detailedMode field added to NotificationPreferences type.
Predabook: boot.loader.systemd-boot.rebootForBitlocker=true adicionado. Fix p/ dual boot Windows (BSOD por TPM/BitLocker)
Cloudarm mcp-fetch fix: uvx não é módulo Python. Corrigido p/ writeShellScript com unset PYTHONPATH + exec uv/bin/uvx mcp-fetch

Phase 02 Notification Gating planned with 3 plans in 2 waves:
- Plan 01 (Wave 1): Types update (add detailedMode), Vitest setup for app/, pure gating functions in notificationGating.ts (resolveNotificationAction, resolveCollisionAction, buildNotificationTag, deriveEventType) with TDD
- Plan 02 (Wave 2): SW push handler gating integration + foreground gating (showLocalNotification + messaging.firebase.ts) + MOCK_PUSH removal + Simulator "Copiar payload" button
- Plan 03 (Wave 2): Settings UI with Radix Accordion + Switch primitives, 3 accordion sections (Padrão Global, Por Tipo de Evento, Notificações Repetidas), auto-save, restore defaults
Requirements: SW-01, SW-02, SW-03 covered by Plans 01+02; SETT-01 covered by Plan 03
Key: notification tag = assetId only (NOT compound), collision scope = per asset any event type, fail-open on IDB error, detailedMode boolean persisted in IDB
Cloudarm infect plano: 3 etapas. 1) nixos-infect config padrão 2) copiar hw-config gerado 3) aplicar flake dotfiles#cloudarm
Reestruturação pós-infect: 1) separar common/global em universal vs desktop-only 2) reestruturar claude.nix (local-rag→remote Ollama/Qdrant)
NixOS/HM dotfiles config path: /home/bruno/dotfiles
Phase 04 home-redesign planned: 3 plans. Plan01=types+assetsStore, Plan02=AssetRow+HomePage redesign, Plan03=FCM integration+flash+cleanup. 11 total tasks.
Phase04 Plan01: (1) AssetSnapshotItem camelCase type in app types (2) AssetSnapshotResponse type (3) assetsStore Zustand+httpsCallable (4) formatRelativeTime via date-fns ptBR

FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 é obrigatório no .env local para dev. Sem ela, admin.auth().verifyIdToken() rejeita tokens do Firebase Auth Emulator com 401. A variável precisa estar no ambiente ANTES do processo do emulador iniciar. Carregada via direnv (.envrc usa dotenv_if_exists .env).

Decisões de pricing valida.doctor — Mar/2026:

Planos:
- Mensal: R$57/mês
- Trimestral: R$147 (≈R$49/mês)
- Semestral: R$237 (≈R$39,50/mês)
- SEM plano anual — público tem churn estrutural pós-prova

ARPU conservador para modelagem: R$50/mês (mix trimestral dominante)

Custos fixos reais (one man army, início):
- Cenário MEI: R$175/mês (MEI R$75 + imprevistos R$100)
- Cenário SLU: R$400/mês (contador R$300 + imprevistos R$100)

Formalização:
- Intenção: começar MEI, migrar para SLU quando abrir outra empresa no futuro
- Sem sócio, sem outra empresa por ora

Zero caixa inicial — fundador subsidia custos do próprio bolso até break-even.

Análise competitiva Revalida — dados coletados Mar/2026:

1. Simula Revalida (simularevalida.com.br): Free (simulados rápidos, 1 vídeo/dia) | Pro R$39,90/mês (cronograma IA, vídeos ilimitados). App Android. React SPA.

2. Revalida Resolve (revalidaresolve.com): Trimestral R$127 (≈R$42/mês) | Semestral R$197 (≈R$33/mês) | Anual R$297 (≈R$25/mês). 5.000+ questões, roteiro por incidência, 4 modos, analytics IA, revisão espaçada (7/15/60d). Via Hotmart.

3. Pense Revalida (penserevalida.com): Foco 2ª etapa (prova prática). Free 5 dias | Extensivo R$800 (até prova). 600+ checklists OSCE, IA de correção, chat parceiros.

4. Eu Médico Revalida (eumedicorevalida.com.br): Modelo cursinho. Intensivo R$3.462 / Extensivo R$4.947–R$6.046. 40k+ questões comentadas.

5. Medsimulados (medsimulados.com): Aparenta gratuito. Simulados por categoria, tracking de progresso. Ruby on Rails.

6. Revalida Simulado (revalidasimulado.com): Gratuito (com ads Google). Banco grátis, simulados, checklists 2ª etapa, cronograma. Next.js.

7. Simulados INEP (simuladosinep.com.br): Gratuito aparentemente. 1.665 questões INEP 2011-2025, Revalida+ENAMED+ENARE. React SPA.

8. MedTask: referência mercado — 90k questões, R$249/mês.

Nosso preço: R$149/mês | R$699/semestre | R$997/ano.
Nosso diferencial: gabarito comentado referenciando protocolos brasileiros (PCDT, SBC, SBP) + foco exclusivo Revalida + freemium genuíno + analytics de progresso.
Phase04 Plan03: (1) FCM onMessage triggers assetsStore.refreshAssets (2) CSS @keyframes flash animation on refresh (3) cleanup dead code + verify build
Predabook specs: i7-10750H 6c/12t, 16GB RAM, RTX 2060 6GB VRAM, x86_64-linux. NixOS com btrfs+zstd.
Cloudarm Ollama tuning: OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=8, KEEP_ALIVE=-1, MAX_LOADED_MODELS=4. Embedding workload, muitos requests paralelos.
Cloudarm kernel: linuxPackages_latest configurado. Risco em cloud — se causar problema de boot, trocar para default do channel

Account sharing detection (concurrent sessions by uid) identified as future work — NOT implemented. Separate from rate limiting by IP (which protects against bank extraction). Needs its own phase/feature.
Cloudarm hw-config.nix é placeholder. Disco real: sda1=root(ext4), sda15=EFI(vfat 98MB). Infect gera o correto — copiar depois

Phase04 Plan01 complete: assetsStore Zustand store with loadSnapshot, patchAsset, clearFlash, selectSortedFilteredAssets, selectAssetCounts. 19 tests passing. formatRelativeTime + flash-highlight animation added.
Phase 04 home-redesign: 2 plans verified. Plan01=types+store TDD (wave1), Plan02=UI components+home restructure+checkpoint (wave2). All 7 reqs covered (DASH-01..05, HOME-01..02).

Memory profiling results for NestJS API (2026-03-13):
- Tool: GET /api/health returns process.memoryUsage() (rss_mb, heap_used_mb, heap_total_mb, external_mb)
- Script: api/scripts/profile-memory.mjs — measures cold start + RSS at 4 stages + leak detection
- Command: pnpm profile:memory (in api/)
- Results with @nestjs/throttler + helmet:
  - Cold start local: 2198ms (estimated production: ~1.3–1.5s, emulator adds overhead)
  - RSS peak: 207.2 MB (~80% of 256MiB)
  - RSS after idle: 173.0 MB (GC released 34MB)
  - No memory leak detected
  - New deps (@nestjs/throttler, helmet) added only 0.1MB RSS — negligible
- Conclusion: 256MiB confirmed sufficient. 512MiB had no justification (was error by Phase 10.1 planner).
- Cold start is NestJS DI container bootstrap (12 modules + reflect-metadata) — not dep-related
- minInstances=1 would eliminate cold start at cost of ~R$47/month idle (already in COST_ANALYSIS)
Cloudarm: Oracle A1.Flex, 4 ARM cores, 24GB RAM, 200GB, aarch64-linux. Migração via nixos-infect.
Phase04 Plan02: (1) AssetRow component with status badge/dwell/coords (2) HomePage redesign assets-first (3) SummaryCards from assetsStore (4) remove useAssetSummary+message list

Phase 04 research done. No new deps. assetsStore via httpsCallable+Zustand. date-fns formatDistanceToNow+ptBR for relative time. Skeleton=animate-pulse. Flash=CSS keyframe 2s. FCM patches both stores.
MCPs no cloudarm (supergateway): playwright(8002), fetch(8003), context7(8004), context(8005), nixos. Prioridade: context antes de context7

Phase 03 asset-snapshot-backend research completed. Key findings:
- No new npm dependencies needed — all building blocks exist
- getAssetsByUnits() goes in existing assetRepository.ts (137 lines, small file)
- Dynamic IN clause: generate ? placeholders, spread units into args array
- Critical pitfall: 'todas' is NOT a database value — filter it out before SQL query
- Empty IN clause is a SQLite syntax error — check before querying
- Test pattern: mock firebase-functions/v2/https, mock @app/lib/firebase.js, mock assetRepository
- requireActiveUser() returns AppUser with units field — use that, never request.data units
- Response must strip last_message_id and silent_alert_sent_at from AssetRow
- vitest 2.x (not 4.x) due to vite 5.x dependency
Cloudarm SSH: user ubuntu, key ~/.ssh/cloudarm.key (RSA, do LastPass entry 6358867201542651779), IP 137.131.233.96

NestJS architecture rules for valida.doctor — NON-NEGOTIABLE in every plan and execution:

1. shared/schemas/ = APENAS contratos HTTP (Request/Response entre frontend e backend). Nunca cruza a fronteira do controller. Services e repositories NUNCA importam de shared/schemas/.

2. db/schema.ts = APENAS dentro do repository. Nenhuma outra camada (service, controller, domain) importa ou conhece o schema Drizzle. Tipos Drizzle (InferSelect, etc.) nunca saem do repository.

3. Fluxo obrigatório:
   HTTP Request
   → Controller: recebe XxxRequest (shared/schemas) via ZodValidationPipe
   → Controller: mapeia para DTO interno (TypeScript puro, sem Zod, sem Drizzle)
   → Service: trabalha com DTOs e entities (domain/) — nunca vê shared/schemas, nunca vê db/schema
   → Repository: recebe domain DTO → executa query Drizzle → mapeia resultado para domain entity → retorna entity
   → Service: retorna domain entity para controller
   → Controller: mapeia entity para XxxResponse (shared/schemas)
   → HTTP Response

4. Estrutura por módulo:
   modules/<domain>/
   ├── <domain>.module.ts
   ├── <domain>.controller.ts   — thin: validação + mapeamento request→DTO + mapeamento entity→response
   ├── <domain>.service.ts      — business logic, recebe/retorna domain types
   ├── <domain>.repository.ts   — ÚNICO lugar com Drizzle queries e imports de db/schema.ts
   ├── dto/                     — DTOs internos (TypeScript puro, sem Zod, sem Drizzle)
   └── entities/                — domain entities com comportamento (TypeScript puro)

5. Injeção de dependência: tudo via DI do NestJS. Nenhum `new Service()` ou `new Repository()` manual em runtime. Libs externas (PostHog, email, etc.) são providers NestJS injetados via módulo.

6. @CurrentUser() retorna string (uid) — encapsula DecodedIdToken Firebase. Controllers nunca recebem DecodedIdToken diretamente.

REGRA CRÍTICA para memory_remember: o storage trunca silenciosamente conteúdo longo. NUNCA salvar mais de 300 caracteres por memória. Quebrar informação em múltiplas memórias pequenas e atômicas. Uma decisão = uma memória. Verificar com recall imediatamente após salvar.

README.md e .env.example devem SEMPRE refletir o estado atual do projeto. Ao encerrar qualquer fase, verificar se esses arquivos estão desatualizados e corrigir antes de declarar a fase completa. Isso inclui: stack, diretórios, scripts, variáveis de ambiente, e estrutura do projeto. Não é opcional — faz parte do checklist de encerramento de fase.

Phase 02 UAT gap closure: Plan 02-04 created to fix foreground push duplicate feed entries. Root cause: dual delivery in FirebaseMessagingService.initialize() — both onMessage and SW postMessage broadcast call addMessage for the same push. Fix: dedup guard in addMessage checking messageStamp + assetName before prepending. TDD approach with 5 test cases.

Phase 2 Plan 2 completed: SW push handler gating integrated. SW v4 reads IDB preferences via getPreferences(), gates OS notifications with resolveNotificationAction(), handles collisions via resolveCollisionAction(). MOCK_PUSH handler removed. Foreground gating via Zustand getState(). Simulator has "Copiar payload" button. Commits: 31fbe26 (SW handler), 5ea8322 (foreground + simulator).

Phase 03 Plan 01 completed: getAssetSnapshot Cloud Function implemented via TDD. Key artifacts:
- AssetSnapshotItem type in types/index.ts (Omit<AssetRow, 'last_message_id' | 'silent_alert_sent_at'>)
- getAssetsByUnits() in services/assetRepository.ts with parameterized WHERE IN + empty guard
- getAssetSnapshot CF in functions/getAssetSnapshot.ts: auth → requireActiveUser → unit routing (todas=getAllAssets, specific=getAssetsByUnits, empty=[]) → rowToSnapshot field stripping → response {assets, snapshotAt, count}
- Turso errors caught and rethrown as HttpsError('unavailable')
- 13 new tests (5 repo + 8 CF), total 136 tests passing
- SNAP-01, SNAP-02 requirements complete

Plan 02-03 (Settings UI) completed Tasks 1-2, awaiting checkpoint:human-verify for Task 3. Commits: 2a029a8 (Accordion+Switch primitives), 704f5cd (NotificationsSection expanded), ee61172 (docs metadata). CSS-in-JS used for checkmark animation since tailwindcss-animate not installed. Pre-existing uncommitted changes from Plan 02-02 found in messaging.firebase.ts, notifications.ts, and Simulator/index.tsx — left untouched.

Phase 10.1 post-migration fixes completed (2026-03-13):
1. app.setGlobalPrefix('api') added to main.ts and createTestApp
2. vite.config.ts proxy target fixed to include /api suffix
3. admin.initializeApp() explicit call in main.ts required for emulator auth
4. FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 must be in .env before emulator starts
5. SkillsController: GET /skills → GET /admin/skills with RoleGuard
6. seed-local.mjs made idempotent with WHERE NOT EXISTS
7. memory: '256MiB' restored (was incorrectly set to 512MiB by Phase 10.1 planner)
8. All test paths updated to /api/ prefix (9 test files)

createProductionDb() foi renomeado para createDbClient() em api/src/db/db.ts. O nome anterior era enganoso porque a função roda em todos os ambientes (local, staging, produção) dependendo de DB_DRIVER.

Phase 2 Plan 01 executed successfully: Pure notification gating functions (resolveNotificationAction, resolveCollisionAction, buildNotificationTag, deriveEventType) implemented via TDD in app/src/lib/notificationGating.ts. Vitest 2.x configured (not 4.x due to vite 5 peer dep). 20 tests all passing. detailedMode boolean added to NotificationPreferences. Requirements SW-01, SW-02, SW-03 complete.

Root cause of login being broken after Phase 10.1 NestJS migration: Firebase Hosting rewrites pass the FULL original path to the function (docs: "the function receives the full original request path"). So /api/auth/profile arrives at NestJS as /api/auth/profile. NestJS had no global prefix, so it looked for /auth/profile → 404. Fix: app.setGlobalPrefix('api') in main.ts (before app.init()) and createTestApp (same). All 9 test files updated to use /api/ prefix. pnpm test:integration: 213/213 pass. pnpm test:unit: 10/10 pass. pnpm build: clean.

10.1-06 complete: All 12 NestJS modules created. 4 test files migrated to createTestApp(). Key bugs fixed: (1) DashboardEntity missing nextRevalidaDate/daysUntilRevalida → DashboardResponseSchema.parse() was failing with 400; (2) DashboardResponseSchema missing answeredCount on specialty arrays; (3) POST /auth/profile needed @HttpCode(200); (4) firebase-admin needs vi.mock() in auth tests. 361 tests passing across 14 test files. Next: 10.1-07 (Express→NestJS cutover).

512MiB memory setting root cause (2026-03-13): Phase 10.1 planner hardcoded memory: '512MiB' in NestJS main.ts template code. Introduced in commit a818172 (feat(10.1-01): create AppModule). The autonomous: true flag + hardcoded value in plan template = executor applied without user review. COST_ANALYSIS.md was calculating with correct 256MiB but deployed code used 512MiB — silent divergence. Fixed back to 256MiB.

Phase 10.1 verification: gaps_found. 
- PASS: TSC zero errors (api+web), 225 tests pass, index.ts thin re-export, 11 NestJS modules present and complete, AppModule imports all 11, no controller imports db/schema, no SQL in controllers, old Express routes deleted.
- FAIL: auth.service.ts:84 calls onboardingSchema.parse(body) — Zod .parse() in service layer violates CONTEXT.md layer rules. Fix: move schema + parse to controller, service receives typed params.
- NOTE: Success criterion says "12 modules" but only 11 exist (simulations.ts is legacy shim per plan intent). Likely spec error.
- NOTE: Test count 225, not 250+. All existing tests pass.

Login fix completo após Phase 10.1: três mudanças necessárias simultaneamente:
1. app.setGlobalPrefix('api') em main.ts e createTestApp — Firebase Hosting passa path completo /api/... para a function
2. vite.config.ts proxy target: "http://localhost:5001/demo-revalida/southamerica-east1/api" (com /api no final) — emulador stripa o nome da function antes de entregar ao Express
3. admin.initializeApp() explícito em main.ts antes do bootstrap — o Functions emulator intercepta essa chamada via proxy para configurar auth emulator support (setJwtVerificationEnabled). Sem ela, verifyIdToken rejeita tokens do emulador com 401 mesmo com FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST setado.

Phase 10.1 (Architecture Refactor Express → NestJS) validada e funcionando em dev local em 2026-03-13. Login, dashboard, simulado, admin, analytics — tudo navegando sem erro. Pendências resolvidas: setGlobalPrefix('api'), initializeApp() em main.ts, vite.config.ts proxy target com /api no final.
